channel.title: SSH on Terra Nullius
channel.description: Recent content in SSH on Terra Nullius
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

item.title: Get a Shell to a Kubernetes Node
item.description: Throughout the lifecycle of your Kubernetes cluster, you may need to access a cluster worker node. This access could be for maintenance, configuration inspection, log collection, or other troubleshooting operations. More than that, it would be nice, if you could enable this access whenever it’s needed and disable when you finish your task. SSH Approach While it’s possible to configure Kubernetes nodes with SSH access, this also makes worker nodes more vulnerable.
